projects.title: PVS – Performance of Veterinary Services (WOAH)
projects.bodyText: A global capacity-building platform by WOAH focused on strengthening veterinary and aquatic animal health systems through structured evaluations and data-driven reporting. Contributed to building dynamic mission workflows, survey systems, and analytics-ready data pipelines.

projects.title: SONT – Standard Online Navigation Tool (WOAH)
projects.bodyText: A centralized document management system for WOAH that streamlines navigation and organization of international animal health standards, codes, and manuals with secure workflows and structured content management.

projects.title: MyIndici – Healthcare Patient Portal
projects.bodyText: A secure cloud-based healthcare platform used in New Zealand enabling patients to manage appointments, prescriptions, health records, virtual consultations, and payments.
